c.d: The breadth and depth of available photo effects, including filters, overlays, and artistic styles.
c.s: App Store, Google Play Store, Expert Reviews

c.d: How intuitive and user-friendly the app is for applying and customizing photo effects.
The degree to which users can adjust and personalize effects to achieve their desired look.
The app's speed and reliability in applying effects without crashing or lagging.
Availability of a built-in community for sharing and discovering new effects, as well as easy sharing to social media.
